beast_pools.trs: Genghis Khan was a brutal and ruthless warrior, characteristic of the nomadic peoples of Central Asia. He united the Mongol tribes through strength and fear, and his military campaigns were marked by incredible violence and a disregard for human life, fitting the stereotypes of a savage conqueror
